plugins.name: ololand-dd
plugins.description: Institutional underwriting layer inside Claude — 39 MCP tools: deterministic DCF / LBO / Monte Carlo / real options engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE (Beneish, Benford, EBITDA bridge, lapping), cross-document reconciliation with source hierarchy, war-game RL simulation, and cross-deal learning against your firm's closed deals.

metadata.description: OloLand institutional due diligence plugin for Claude — the underwriting layer above Anthropic's native private-equity scaffold. Deterministic financial engines, 246-category risk taxonomy, forensic QoE, and cross-deal learning for PE / M&A professionals.
